channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.description:
Fly tip

item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: 12, 5th May
item.description:
C11 bus route is causing serious damage to the side of cars parked on Westbere Road another incident today three in the last month.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 31, Westbere Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 5th May
item.description:
Street light 01Z0168 not working. Drug dealers turn off this light to do their business.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alliance Road, Plumstead

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich

item.title: Graffiti on lamp post on Shooters Hil near bus stop, 5th May
item.description:
The graffiti has been there for a few weeks. Please can it be removed.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on green box on Donaldson Road, near junction of Shooters Hill, 5th May
item.description:
Please can this be removed. I spotted it on a walk this afternoon . I hadn’t seen it before.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 59 Lordship Lane-Flytipping-3rd Complaint, 5th May
item.description:
3rd Complaint-The establishment is closed down. If it is the duty of another to remove the pellats then it is the council to enforce them of the appropriate disposal of the refuse as it is on the pavement and could cause someone harm if they are visually impaired for example. They need to be removed.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 59, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on silver box on Shrewsbury Lane near No 51, 5th May
item.description:
This graffiti has been there for a few weeks. This was my first opportunity to take a picture.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shrewsbury Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 2 x illuminated bollards down. 1 is crushed., 5th May
item.description:
Bollards knocked down again by large vehicle that couldn’t navigate the roundabout again, if the council had width restrictions these huge vehicles/cisches/articulated Lorry’s would not be able to access this roundabout. This happens constantly yet no one does anything about it,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wades Hill, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping, 5th May
item.description:
Flytipping

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 24, Chapel Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging trees on pavement, 5th May
item.description:
Difficult to walk around the corner as the trees/ bushes are overhanging on pavement so no space to walk particularly with pram or wheelchair

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 117, Rydal Drive, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Chesterfield Grove (Along wall of Joe the Juice)-Flytipping-3rd Complaint, 5th May
item.description:
3rd Complaint: It is completely unacceptable that this is a site for dumping/non-removal of a toilet tank lid and nothing is being done about its removal which will encourage more flytipping and/or inappropriate disposal. The fact that it is a street full of young children and the health and safety is dismissed is shocking. The Duty of Care is not being demonstrated of not enforcing the law towards the organisation in regards to the responsible manner of rubbish disposal/removal, where it will encourage unhygienic practices.This sends a message that this conduct has no accountability. Health and safety of the residents and wider community should be paramount, not ignored.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, Chesterfield Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: A Fly Tipping on Street problem has been found, 5th May
item.description:
